steps.description: Type  ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}}  into the "Input an application name" text field in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension popup within Visual Studio Code.
Press Enter to confirm the application name ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}} in the input dialog at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
@assertion there's ${{var:app_name}} in the "EXPLORER" section. Don't care if it is uppercase letter.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code while viewing the "Overview of the Basic Tab template" documentation file in Preview mode.
Type the command 'View: close all editors' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette to execute the action.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm the "View: Close All Editors" command in Visual Studio Code's command palette.
